info.title: Owned Sales Automation API
info.description: Repo-owned API contract derived from the captured SalesAutomation swagger and extended with workflow endpoints required for assistant-driven automation.

get.summary: List service requests visible to the current user.

post.summary: Create a new client or admin service request.

get.summary: Get the detail view for a single service request.

post.summary: Mark a service request as under review.
Create or link an opportunity for a service request.
Create or link a proposal for a service request.
Assign one or more representatives to a service request.
Apply the client's approval or rejection of proposed assignments.
Apply the representative's acceptance or rejection of an assignment.
